title: Protein Folding: EML Depth of the Sequence-Structure Map

levinthal_paradox.levinthal_paradox: EML-∞ (how folding is fast despite EML-1 search space)
levinthal_paradox.resolution: Energy funnel guides search: EML-∞ → EML-2 depth reduction

cooperativity.note: Width = EML-0; the transition itself = EML-∞

energy_landscape.key_insight: Conformation count = EML-1; funnel G(Q) = EML-2; folding transition = EML-∞

secondary_structure.key_insight: Helix-coil = EML-2; nucleation σ = EML-1; sharp transition = EML-∞

evoformer.note: AlphaFold2 computes at EML-1; why it works = EML-∞

alphafold.key_insight: AlphaFold2 solves EML-∞ folding problem with EML-1 computation

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Cooperativity width 1/N, hydrophobic linear energy, pLDDT thresholds
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Conformation count 3^{3N}, nucleation parameter σ, AlphaFold attention
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Funnel free energy G(Q), folding temperature T_f, helix-coil θ_H
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Levinthal paradox, folding transition, native state uniqueness, AlphaFold accuracy

key_theorem: The EML Protein Folding Theorem: The sequence-structure mapping is EML-∞: Levinthal's paradox shows exhaustive conformational search is EML-1 (exponentially large). The energy funnel is EML-2 (free energy landscape with gradient). The folding transition is EML-∞ (first-order-like phase transition). AlphaFold2 achieves the extraordinary: it solves an EML-∞ problem using EML-1 computation (attention-based inference). This may be the most practically consequential EML-∞ → EML-1 depth reduction.
rabbit_hole_log: 3^{3N} conformations = EML-1 (exponential): same class as BCS, Kondo, instantons
Energy funnel G(Q) = EML-2: free energy as function of reaction coordinate
Helix nucleation σ = EML-1: small because ΔG_nuc involves exp(-cost/kT)
AlphaFold EvoFormer = EML-1: softmax attention at core
Folding transition = EML-∞: same as liquid-gas phase transition
AlphaFold accuracy = EML-∞: no theoretical explanation for why it works so well

connections.S57_stat_mech: Partition function = EML-1; protein conformation count = EML-1: same
connections.S165_soc: Folding = rapid search on funnel; SOC = self-organization: both find EML-∞ attractor quickly
